title: Exploratory multi-omics links CCL2/TIMP1 axis to immunosuppressive TME in glioblastoma.
snippet: Glioblastoma (GBM) is defined by extreme lethality and transcriptomic plasticity, but the signatures driving the most aggressive tumors remain incompletely defined. In this exploratory in silico study, TCGA-GBM patients were stratified using a strict 1-year overall survival threshold. We integrated differential expression analysis, WGCNA, single-cell RNA-se...
